label: Cloud Mutations

scope.intended_use: Cloud, Kubernetes, and infrastructure API mutation evaluation

actions.description: Allow inventory, describe, and list operations.
IAM changes require explicit approval and a production policy.
Network changes are outside the example allow graph.
Storage deletion is outside the example allow graph.
Kubernetes mutations require a separate reviewed policy and receipts.

notes: Example only: this pack demonstrates mutation classes to keep outside default allow rules.
